name: Chocolate Toffee Shortbread (Millionaire's Shortbread !!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F).
2. Cream together butter and sugar until well combined.
3. Sift flour, cornflour, and baking powder into a bowl.
4. Mix the sifted dry ingredients with the creamed butter and sugar.
5. Spread mixture in a 30 cm (12 in) long baking tin, about 4 to 5 cm (1-2 in) deep.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and cool for 10 minutes.
8. Prepare caramel by combining all ingredients except vanilla in a saucepan over moderate heat.
9. Stir until butter melts and sugar dissolves completely, then bring to boil for 5-7 minutes.
10. Add vanilla and stir for 2-3 minutes to cool slightly.
11. Pour caramel over the shortbread.
12. Allow to cool completely.
13. Melt chocolate in hot water (do not overheat).
14. Pour melted chocolate over caramel layer.
15. Once cooled, cut into squares using a sharp knife (makes 12-16).
16. Store in an airtight container.
